}}

item.title: Modern Product
item.dc:creator: lsadmin
item.content:encoded: [vc_row css=".vc_custom_1558958678165{border-top-width: 0px !important;}"][vc_column hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" offset="vc_col-md-7" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1551675514988{margin_bottom_tablet:30px},"][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" width="1/2" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1566289845418{margin_bottom_mobile:15px}," hongo_column_animation_delay="200" hongo_column_animation_duration="1500"][hongo_pfeature_box hongo_product_feature_type="interactive-banner-style-5" hongo_featurebox_image="34625" hongo_feature_number="01" hongo_feature_title="BASIC BACKPACK WITH ZIP CLOSURE DOUBLE COMPARTMENT"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" width="1/2" hongo_column_animation_delay="400" hongo_column_animation_duration="1500"][hongo_pfeature_box hongo_product_feature_type="interactive-banner-style-5" hongo_featurebox_image="34625" hongo_feature_number="02" hongo_feature_title="INSIDE FEATURES A COMPARTMENT STORING ELECTRONIC"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeIn" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" css=".vc_custom_1566289877343{padding-left: 35px !important;}" offset="vc_col-md-5" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1566289877351{padding_left_tablet:15px}," hongo_column_animation_delay="600" hongo_column_animation_duration="1500"][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1550642543544{margin-bottom: 35px !important;}"]Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. in ullamcorper ieo, eget euismod orci. cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis and montes nascetur ridiculus mus. vestibulum ultricies aliquam convallis. maecenas tellus mi. proin tincidunt, lectus volutpat mattis, ante metus lacinia tellus, vitae condimentum nulla enim bibendum nibh. praesent turpis interdum nec venenatis id, pretium sit amet purus maecenas tellus mi. proin tincidunt. lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. in ullamcorper leo, eget euismod orci. cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis and montes nascetur ridiculus mus. vestibulum ultricies aliquam convallis.[/vc_column_text][hongo_lists hongo_list_style="list-style-7" hongo_list_values="%5B%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Made%20from%20soft%20yet%20durable%20100%25%20organic%20cotton%20twill%22%7D%2C%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Front%20and%20back%20yoke%20seams%20allow%20a%20full%20range%20of%20shoulder%20motion%22%7D%2C%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Comfortable%20nylon-bound%20elastic%20cuffs%20seal%20in%20warmth%22%7D%2C%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Hem%20adjusts%20by%20pulling%20cord%20in%20handwarmer%20pockets%20and%20releases%22%7D%2C%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Interior%20storm%20flap%20and%20zipper%20garage%20at%20chin%20for%20comfort%22%7D%2C%7B%22hongo_list_value%22%3A%22Increases%20coverage%20for%20harness%20and%20hipbelt%20compatibility%22%7D%5D"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1551675810710{padding_top_tablet:50px},"][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeInLeft" width="1/2" hongo_enable_responsive_css="1" responsive_css=".hongo_responsive_1566289973399{margin_bottom_mobile:15px}," hongo_column_animation_duration="1500"][hongo_shop_banner hongo_shop_banner_style="hongo-shop-banner-1" content_position="left-side-product" hongo_title="SECURE||POCKET" hongo_subtitle="Secure backpack" hongo_bg_image_type="cover-background" content_desktop_mini_width="md-width-40" content_ipad_width="sm-width-45" content_mobile_width="xs-width-60" css=".vc_custom_1570704095182{padding-top: 16% !important;padding-bottom: 16% !important;background-image: url(https://hongo.themezaa.com/demo-images/2019/06/hongo-900x650-ph-1.jpg?id=34383) !important;}" hongo_shop_banner_preview_image="" hongo_button_setting="" hongo_font_title_setting="" hongo_font_subtitle_setting="" hongo_font_content_setting=""]Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting.[/hongo_shop_banner][/vc_column][vc_column hongo_column_animation_style="fadeInRight" width="1/2" hongo_column_animation_duration="1500"][hongo_shop_banner hongo_shop_banner_style="hongo-shop-banner-1" content_position="right-side-product" hongo_title="HAND||CRAFT" hongo_subtitle="Double compartment" hongo_bg_image_type="cover-background" content_desktop_mini_width="md-width-40" content_ipad_width="sm-width-45" content_mobile_width="xs-width-60" css=".vc_custom_1568032411145{padding-top: 16% !important;padding-bottom: 16% !important;background-image: url(https://hongo.themezaa.com/demo-images/2019/06/hongo-900x650-ph-1.jpg?id=34383) !important;}"]Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting.[/hongo_shop_banner][/vc_column][/vc_row]
